g.text: R42 is DNP -- populate ONLY to bypass FPGA control.
Q42/Q43 (populated, default-OFF via R44/R45) block bias at POR.
-> Q43 OFF at POR -> no bias until FPGA asserts HIGH.
FPGA must drive BIAS_ISO0/1 HIGH; MCP4728 defaults (code=0) are safe.
R42/R43 DNP -- populate ONLY to bypass FPGA control.
-> Q42 OFF at POR -> no bias until FPGA asserts HIGH.
R43 is DNP -- populate ONLY to bypass FPGA control.
